If ThisForm.Opc_Rel.Value = 1
	Report Form SigReCgp To Print Prompt NoConsole
ENDIF
If INLIST(ThisForm.Opc_Rel.Value,2)		&& mena - 05/03/3017 - incluida opcao 5 JAL
	Report Form SigReCg1 To Print Prompt NoConsole
endif
If INLIST(ThisForm.Opc_Rel.Value,5)		&& mena - 13/04/3017 - novo report para opcao 5 JAL
	Report Form SigReCg2 To Print Prompt NoConsole
ENDIF
If ThisForm.Opc_Rel.Value = 3
	Report Form SigPrCpr To Print Prompt NoConsole
Endif

Lparameters loForm

ThisForm.parentform = loForm
DoDefault()
Thisform.poDataMgr = CreateObject('fSqlConector')

ThisForm.Container1.Visible = .F.
ThisForm.Label1.Visible = .F.
ThisForm.Label2.Visible = .F.

*** Só habilita tipo de relatorio 5 se houver filtro por movimentaçăo ***
WITH thisform.parentform.fld_principal.pag_Consulta.filtro.principal
	thisform.opc_Rel.option5.Enabled=.get_operaçăoi.value<>0
ENDWITH

Local lcEmpresa, lcTitulo, lcSubtit, lcGrupo, llImpImag
Local lcApagar, lcBrancos, lcEDN
public pcTotais

llImpImag = .T.

lnOrdem = ThisForm.Opc_Ordem.Value
lnTpRel = ThisForm.Opc_Rel.Value

ThisForm.lnval = Iif(INLIST(lnTpRel,2),1,0)

If( INLIST(lnTpRel,3,4) )	&& mena 01/09/2016 - incluido relatorio tipo 4
	ThisForm.ProcCompEsp1()
	Return
Endif

******   Criaçăo do Cabeçalho do Relatório   *****
Create Cursor csCabecalho (NomeEmpresa c(80), Titulo c(200), ImpImagem l(1))
Select CrSigCdEmp
Go T... [TRUNCADO]

If Used('crRelProm') Then
	Select crRelProm
	Go Top
	Scan
		xImg = AllTrim(fLimpaString(crRelProm.cPros))
		lcArquivo = Sys(2023) + '\T' + xImg + '.jpg'
		If File(lcArquivo)
			Delete File (lcArquivo)
		Endif
	EndScan
EndIf

ThisForm.parentform.Enabled = .t.

If ThisForm.Opc_Rel.Value = 1
	Report Form SigReCgp Preview NoConsole
ENDIF

If INLIST(ThisForm.Opc_Rel.Value,2)		&& mena - 05/03/3017 - incluida opcao 5 JAL
	Report Form SigReCg1 Preview NoConsole
ENDIF

If INLIST(ThisForm.Opc_Rel.Value,5)		&& mena - 13/04/3017 - novo report para opcao 5 JAL
	Report Form SigReCg2 Preview NoConsole
ENDIF

If ThisForm.Opc_Rel.Value = 3
	Report Form SigPrCpr Preview NoConsole
Endif
